productDisplayName: Puma Women Kuris Silver & Grey Sports Shoes
description: Kuris from puma is a lightweight training shoe that adds superior styling to a classic design. The mesh upper lends itself to breathability and lightness. The shoes come with great midsole support coupled with a shock absorber function. The rubber soles in a multi-directional pattern give ample grip to the feet, while the forefoot flexors allow greater flexibility.UpperMesh upper for maximum breathabilityReflectives for greater safety dawn to duskPadded collar and tongue for snug Fit and shock absorptionLace up front for snug fitMidsoleIdCELL midsole with ArchTec component for greater supportOrthoLite insole for superior breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial propertiesCushioned footbed made from an environmentally friendly, sustainable material instead of traditional fossil fuel-based materialOutsoleEverTrack outsole for abrasion resistance with EverRide component for lightweight cushioningMulti directional patterns in carbon rubber for strong grip on uneven terrainScoop below the heel area for ultimate air traction while running or walkingShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
